label: The Quenched Pike
description: The Quenched Pike serves as a licensed weapon shop set into Cindervale’s older broken masonry, its façade braced with riveted iron straps that match the city’s later bastionwork. A barred counter divides the sales floor from a narrow armory bay, where pikes, billhooks, and crossbows hang in ranked order beneath soot-dark rafters. License-stones are mortared into the lintel and interior wall, listing toll classes, permitted carry within the ring-markers, and strict prohibitions on breach-zone implements. The air carries the permanent tang of quenched steel, oil, and char, and the floorboards are scored by decades of testing edges and balancing hafted arms.
